category.spicedcider.client.tooltip: Settings that only apply to your game client.
category.spicedcider.compat.tooltip: Fixes and integrations for other mods. Only shown if the relevant mod is installed.
category.spicedcider.vista.tooltip: Performance tuning for Vista's mirror/TV reflection rendering. Only shown if Vista is installed.
item.spicedcider.sticky_grappling_hook.d: Good for climbing, not fishing. Adheres to walls rather than bouncing off them.
option.spicedcider.bedExplosionPreventio: Beds don't explode outside the Overworld; instead they show a message and wake sleeping villagers.
Registers Every Compat wood-type variants (seats, palisades) for The Block Box. Requires a restart to take effect.
option.spicedcider.cloudFarPlaneDistance: Far clip plane distance in blocks used for the clouds draw call.
option.spicedcider.cloudFarPlaneFix.tool: Gives clouds their own extended far clip plane instead of sharing terrain's (which is capped at render distance * 4 blocks), so cloud mods that draw clouds far away don't get hard-clipped by the GPU with no fade.
option.spicedcider.cooksCollectionDripst: Fixes Cooks' Collection's salted dripstone block causing occlusion/culling issues by basing it on vanilla dripstone block. Requires a restart to take effect.
option.spicedcider.customDeathSound.tool: Plays a custom sound when your player character dies.
option.spicedcider.disableRecipeBookTrac: Disables recipe book unlock tracking/saving/syncing entirely. Saves memory and disk I/O.
option.spicedcider.endCrystalHealing.too: End crystals with no beam target heal nearby damaged entities and render a beam to their heal target.
option.spicedcider.endCrystalPlaceAnywhe: End crystals can be placed on any block, not just obsidian/bedrock.
option.spicedcider.filterUnusedResourceP: Filters out resource pack namespaces that aren't used by any loaded mod, speeding up client asset loading. Requires a restart to take effect.
option.spicedcider.hideMelancholicHunger: Hides Melancholic Hunger's regeneration tooltip lines from item tooltips.
option.spicedcider.keepBrokenItems.toolt: Enchanted, named, or elytra items become "Broken" instead of being destroyed when they run out of durability.
option.spicedcider.randomWorldNaming.too: Auto-generates a random world name on the world creation screen, with a reroll button if Modern World Creation is present.
option.spicedcider.removeQuasiConnectivi: Removes quasi-connectivity from pistons, dispensers, and droppers.
option.spicedcider.respawnAnchorExplosio: Respawn anchors don't explode outside dimensions where they work; instead they show a message.
option.spicedcider.skeletonHealthNerf.to: Skeletons and strays get 12 max health. Requires a restart to take effect.
option.spicedcider.skipRedundantBlockCac: Skips the redundant block shape cache rebuild that happens on every tag reload.
option.spicedcider.spiderRangedWebAttack: Spiders switch to shooting cobweb projectiles at range when their target is trapped.
option.spicedcider.vistaMirrorAlwaysConn: Ignores Vista's square-aspect-ratio restriction when growing connected mirrors, so adjacent mirrors always merge into one group regardless of shape.
option.spicedcider.vistaMirrorIdleUpdate: Reflection update rate used while the viewer's eye is stationary. Set equal to update rate to disable the idle slowdown.
option.spicedcider.vistaMirrorMinUpdateF: The floor that the mirror update rate will never drop below.
Applies performance fixes to Vista's mirror/TV reflection rendering (tightened culling, shared-state thrash suppression, throttled re-renders).
option.spicedcider.vistaMirrorReflection: Max distance in blocks that terrain and entities render to inside a mirror/TV reflection.
option.spicedcider.vistaMirrorThrottleBu: Max milliseconds per frame all mirror reflection re-renders together may take before update-rate throttling kicks in.
How many times per second each mirror re-renders its reflection while the viewer is moving.
option.spicedcider.wisteriaLeafDensityFi: Fixes Environmental's wisteria trees generating with sparse/patchy leaves.
option.spicedcider.wolvesWearAnyArmor.to: Tamed wolves can be equipped with horse/animal armor as body armor.
spicedcider.respawn_blocked: The Respawn Anchor is unresponsive in this dimension
